title: 食物增强
description:
Reward players for consuming a variety of different foods

奖励吃多种不同食物的玩家
body:
When a player consumes a previously uneaten food item and their accumulated hunger value reaches 20, they will receive permanent boosts of +1 Health, +1 Armor, and +1 Attack Damage. These enhancements persist across game sessions and survive character deaths.

The hunger value threshold required to trigger the bonus, as well as the values for health, armor, and attack damage increases, can all be configured through the mod's settings file located in the config folder.

当玩家吃下没有吃过的食物，所累积的饥饿值到达 20 时，为玩家提供生命值 + 1，护甲值 + 1，攻击力 + 1 的永久加成，不会因为退出游戏或死亡消失。

其中触发加成所需的饥饿值，增加的生命值、护甲值、攻击力可以在 config 文件夹中的配置文件中更改。
